<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "4, ['Exact street addresses for properties (e.g., 123 Innovation Way) — template does not support address field', 'Detailed mortgage interest rates, amortization terms, and LTV percentages — these are outside the financing_options schema', 'Request for personal financial documents such as employment verification, pay stubs, and credit reports — not permitted nor representable fields', 'Descriptions of creative workspace potential, artistic community context, and aesthetic design narrative — qualitative details not representable in fixed schema']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "12, ['Condo property listings with price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, and property type', 'Property location (downtown Toronto, creative arts district) via location_neighborhood and location_region fields', 'Eco-friendly, energy-efficient, smart_home features via special_features list', 'Open-concept and loft-style layouts via layout_type', 'Availability of viewing scheduling and coordination requests', 'Financing method preferences (cash, mortgage, first-time buyer) via financing_options.purchase_method', 'Down payment and processing fees using down_payment_required and processing_fees fields', 'Timeline coordination for Q1/Q2 completion via timeline_coordination', 'Service packages for legal, moving, and utilities via service_packages and utility_services sections', 'Survey or inspection costs via total_package_summary.survey_costs', 'Package summary of all costs via total_package_summary section', 'Status updates and confirmations (ready_to_proceed, package_complete, confirmation_tracking)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 4, ['Exact street addresses for properties (e.g., 123 Innovation Way) — template does not support address field', 'Detailed mortgage interest rates, amortization terms, and LTV percentages — these are outside the financing_options schema', 'Request for personal financial documents such as employment verification, pay stubs, and credit reports — not permitted nor representable fields', 'Descriptions of creative workspace potential, artistic community context, and aesthetic design narrative — qualitative details not representable in fixed schema']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 12, ['Condo property listings with price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, and property type', 'Property location (downtown Toronto, creative arts district) via location_neighborhood and location_region fields', 'Eco-friendly, energy-efficient, smart_home features via special_features list', 'Open-concept and loft-style layouts via layout_type', 'Availability of viewing scheduling and coordination requests', 'Financing method preferences (cash, mortgage, first-time buyer) via financing_options.purchase_method', 'Down payment and processing fees using down_payment_required and processing_fees fields', 'Timeline coordination for Q1/Q2 completion via timeline_coordination', 'Service packages for legal, moving, and utilities via service_packages and utility_services sections', 'Survey or inspection costs via total_package_summary.survey_costs', 'Package summary of all costs via total_package_summary section', 'Status updates and confirmations (ready_to_proceed, package_complete, confirmation_tracking)']

indescribable_items: Exact street addresses for properties (e.g., 123 Innovation Way) — template does not support address field
Detailed mortgage interest rates, amortization terms, and LTV percentages — these are outside the financing_options schema
